content: Symlinks under assets/ships/ are forbidden site-wide. The validator treats any resolving to a symlink as a BLOCKING error (rule #1500 in admin/validate-ship-page.sh); companion rule #1501 requires the image filename ship-token to contain the page slug (year-suffix stripped). 328 symlinks were deleted 2026-05-13. Operator verbatim: 'STRIP OUT EVERY SYMLINK. MAke a symlink a blocking error SITEWIDE.'
